name: MOUSE: P.I. For Hire
author: lordvicky
description: Trigger feels for every wheel slot: 10 guns, Mitts, and D-Namite, matching the in-game wheel (12 slots clockwise from Mitts at top). R2 = primary, L2 = alt-fire. Analog wheel mirrors the game's: hold Triangle, point the left stick, release to commit. Create + D-pad jumps to Micer/James Gun/Boomstick/Loose Cannon. Options raises the menu guard (20s); state chips re-anchor drift.
capabilities: 12 states · analog wheel · 4 switch rules · 3 modifiers

name: Nier Replicant
author: LordVicky
description: L2 stays soft, then stiffens hard at the end of the pull and rumbles the longer you hold it; R2 is a light weapon click with an early wall.

name: Stray
author: LordVicky
description: A gentle L2 ramp that firms up through the pull, and an R2 with a ridge mid-travel that settles into a slow rumble when you hold it.
